Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Class SymbolFactory

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.sc.state.SymbolFactory
public final class SymbolFactory extends Object
This class is the factory class for symbol informations used by static checker modules.
Since:
1.3

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SymbolFactory getInstance()

    • makeLocalCarrierSet

      public IIdentifierSymbolInfo makeLocalCarrierSet(String symbol, boolean persistent, IInternalElement problemElement, String component)
      Creates a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo for a local carrier set with the given parameters.
      Parameters:
      symbol - the name of the carrier set
      persistent - true iff the resulting info shall be persistent
      problemElement - an element to which to attach problem markers
      component - the name of the component that contains this symbol
      Returns:
      a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      See Also:
      • ISymbolInfo

    • makeImportedCarrierSet

      public IIdentifierSymbolInfo makeImportedCarrierSet(String symbol, boolean persistent, IInternalElement problemElement, IAttributeType problemAttributeType, String component)
      Creates a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo for an imported carrier set with the given parameters.
      Parameters:
      symbol - the name of the carrier set
      persistent - true iff the resulting info shall be persistent
      problemElement - an element to which to attach problem markers
      component - the name of the component that contains this symbol
      Returns:
      a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      See Also:
      • ISymbolInfo

    • makeLocalConstant

      public IIdentifierSymbolInfo makeLocalConstant(String symbol, boolean persistent, IInternalElement problemElement, String component)
      Creates a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo for a local constant with the given parameters.
      Parameters:

      persistent - true iff the resulting info shall be persistent
      problemElement - an element to which to attach problem markers

      a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
